data.summary: Insufficient evidence to validate the requirement for linking generated artifacts to quote versions.
data.assessment: The exploratory step requires validation that generated artifacts are linked to quote versions. However, the evidence provided does not include any direct references or checks related to the linking of generated artifacts to quote versions, leading to an inconclusive result. The prior step evidence focuses on bookings and offers but lacks the necessary details to confirm that the requirement is satisfied.
gaps: No evidence of linking generated artifacts to quote versions.

deterministicFollowUps.title: Add deterministic evidence contract
deterministicFollowUps.assertion: Define concrete endpoint calls and assertions that directly verify the linking of generated artifacts to quote versions.
